method: Independent read-only comparison of each public release table against its formal source, excluding only declared privacy-transformed fields.
small_cell_result: No background field remains in an individual release, and sparse background JSON sections were removed; therefore no n<5 background cell is publicly reconstructible from this package.
note: Scientific study-design strata (human-review wave/domain/task) were retained because they are required analytic factors rather than participant background attributes.
